error_signature: merge seems to overwrite since both are named 'data'
title: Binary field name conflict in merge combine
symptom: When merging two binary fields named 'data', the merge node overwrites one of them, leading to data loss.
applies_when: Binary fields have the same name
not_this_if: No merge combine operation is performed
root_cause: The merge combine node does not handle binary fields with the same name correctly, resulting in one field being overwritten by the other. This occurs when multiple binary data items are processed without unique identifiers.
fix_steps: Identify the binary property name in your workflow
Use a code node to rename the binary property before merging
Set the new binary property name to avoid conflicts
Proceed with the merge combine operation
agent_instruction: Rename the binary property in a code node before merging to prevent overwriting.
